title: Pratham Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Pratham Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Pratham Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pratham Education:
Pratham Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education!
